subjects.description: single sailboat with a clean white hull and one white sail
subjects.appearance_details: smooth hull reflecting sunset gold, taut triangular sail, slim mast, faint ripples mirrored along the side
subjects.relationship: main moving subject crossing a calm lake within a wide sunset landscape
subjects.location: center frame on the lake surface, moving from left middle distance toward right foreground
subjects.relative_size: medium against the broad lake and distant horizon
subjects.orientation: bow angled slightly right, sail facing the fading sun
subjects.pose: upright and balanced on still water
subjects.action: glides smoothly while the sail catches the last warm light
subjects.state_changes: reflections shift from orange to indigo as the sky darkens
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: painted white fiberglass with glossy sunset highlights

background_setting: vast calm lake at sunset with dark tree silhouettes, low mountains on the horizon, and a sky shifting from orange and pink near the sun to deep indigo above

lighting.conditions: warm golden sunset light on the boat and water, fading into cool blue twilight with soft reflections
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: warm golden sunset light on the boat and water, fading into cool blue twilight with soft reflections

aesthetics.composition: peaceful, cinematic, reflective, spacious, natural color contrast
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: peaceful, cinematic, reflective, spacious, natural color contrast

cinematography.camera_motion: wide steady tracking shot from low lake level, slow lateral follow, gentle depth from foreground ripples to distant mountains
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: photorealistic text to video nature scene
artistic_style: quiet cinematic realism with soft sunset grading and clean atmospheric depth
context: a lone sailboat moves across a silent lake as evening settles over the landscape

actions.description: the sailboat enters the wide frame, its white hull catching orange light while small ripples spread outward
the camera tracks the boat across glassy water as the sail glows and the distant trees deepen into silhouettes
the boat continues into cooler twilight tones, leaving a soft wake under an indigo sky
